global_description: Medium-sized mammal with a slender, elongated body, bushy tail, pointed ears, and sharp muzzle. Fur is typically reddish-orange with white underbelly and black markings on legs and ears. Agile and sleek, adapted for quick movement.

part_details.head: Sharp muzzle, pointed ears, often with black tips
part_details.tail: Bushy, often with a white tip
part_details.fur: Soft, dense, reddish-orange with white underbelly

spatial_relations: Head at front, tail at rear
